verses.quran_arabic: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيْتُونِ
verses.text: By the fig and the olive!

verses.quran_arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We created the human in the finest state.
Then We return him to the lowest of the low

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۢ
verses.text: – except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them (there is) a reward without end.
What will call you a liar after (that) in (regard to) the Judgment?
Is God not the most just of judges?
